name: com.achieve.achieve-package-manager
author: Achieveone
description: Clean UI Toolkit-based package manager with OpenUPM integration, curated Git utilities, and one-click manifest installation.

_upm.changelog:
## Added
- UI Toolkit-based package manager window
- OpenUPM registry integration with one-click install
- Curated GitHub utilities (UniTask, NuGetForUnity, VContainer, ...)
- Custom Git URL installer
- Installed package list with source detection
